span.p:
Relative path:
projects/my-app/src/index.js
(starts from current dir)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Key difference:
Absolute path /home/you/projects (always the same)
Relative path projects (depends on where you are)
From /home/you, 'projects' → /home/you/projects
From /home/other, 'projects' → /home/other/projects
